notes: Paper 32 uses a harmonized Schwarzschild radius r_s = 6.685e26 m for late-time recollapse arithmetic.

The manuscript also quotes M_U = 4.50e53 kg as the rounded measured mass input. Recomputing r_s from that rounded mass with CODATA constants gives a slightly different r_s; both values are exposed here.
The recollapse and cycle scripts use the harmonized Paper 32 radius because it is the value used in the manuscript's 111/222 Gyr chain.

late_time_inputs.bounce_source: Paper 32 bounce-attachment support artifact; conditional on Paper 1/Poplawski high-density torsion bounce regime

hard_restart: optical moment recurrence selecting beta=1 and lambda=1

not_valid_as: universal R4/P4 normalization for arbitrary unreduced observables
universal P4 theorem for every future typed block
